headline: 3 Reasons to Sell ODFL and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Old Dominion Freight Line has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 28.3%. Its stock price has climbed to $218.78, representing a healthy 37.3% increase. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
